mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD ( BOARD_ID, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, PARENT_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, BOARD_TYPE, PRICE, TRADE_STATUS, VIEW_COUNT, REPLY_CNT, LIKE_COUNT, IS_ACTIVE, IS_SELECTED, REG_DATE, UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{board_id}, #{user_id}, #{category_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{parent_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{title}, #{content}, #{board_type}, #{price, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{trade_status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0, 0, 'Y', 'N', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD SET CATEGORY_ID = #{category_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PARENT_ID = #{parent_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, PRICE = #{price, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TRADE_STATUS = #{trade_status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{board_id} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, PARENT_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, BOARD_TYPE, PRICE, TRADE_STATUS, VIEW_COUNT, REPLY_CNT, LIKE_COUNT, IS_ACTIVE, IS_SELECTED, REG_DATE, UPDATE_DATE FROM TBL_BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_FILE ( FILE_ID, BOARD_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, FILE_SIZE, CONTENT_TYPE, TEMP_KEY, SUB_DIR, FILE_KIND, IS_ACTIVE, IS_THUMBNAIL, REG_DATE, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( BOARD_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{board_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{original_name}, #{saved_name}, #{file_size, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{content_type}, #{temp_key, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sub_dir}, #{file_kind}, #{is_active}, #{is_thumbnail}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID AS file_id, BOARD_ID AS board_id, ORIGINAL_NAME AS original_name, SAVED_NAME AS saved_name, FILE_SIZE AS file_size, CONTENT_TYPE AS content_type, TEMP_KEY AS temp_key, SUB_DIR AS sub_dir, FILE_KIND AS file_kind, IS_ACTIVE AS is_active, IS_THUMBNAIL AS is_thumbnail, REG_DATE AS reg_date, UPDATED_AT AS updated_at FROM TBL_BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY CASE WHEN FILE_KIND = 'ATTACH' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, FILE_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_FILE SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE, IS_THUMBNAIL = 'N' WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_FILE SET IS_THUMBNAIL = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND IS_THUMBNAIL = 'Y' AND CONTENT_TYPE = 'IMAGE' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT FILE_ID FROM ( SELECT FILE_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_FILE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND CONTENT_TYPE = 'IMAGE' ORDER BY CASE WHEN FILE_KIND = 'ATTACH' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, FILE_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_FILE SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE, IS_THUMBNAIL = 'N' WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TBL_REPLY SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME FROM ( SELECT BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME FROM TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND LOWER(BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME) LIKE LOWER(#{q}) || '%' ORDER BY BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT LISTAGG(H.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY H.BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME) FROM TBL_BOARD_ASPECT A JOIN TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST H ON H.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID = A.BOARD_HASHTAG_ID WHERE A.BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND NVL(H.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT BOARD_HASHTAG_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST WHERE BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME = #{tagName} AND NVL(IS_ACTIVE, 'Y') = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST ( BOARD_HASHTAG_ID, BOARD_HASHTAG_NAME, IS_ACTIVE, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_BOARD_HASHTAG_LIST.NEXTVAL, #{tagName}, 'Y', SYSDATE )
